name: Hamilton Lane INC
summary: Hamilton Lane Incorporated is a global private markets investment solutions provider founded in 1991, managing approximately $138 billion in discretionary AUM and $819 billion in non-discretionary AUA as of March 31, 2025. The company offers customized separate accounts, specialized commingled funds, and advisory services across private equity, private credit, real estate, infrastructure, real assets, growth equity, venture capital, and impact investing to institutional and private wealth clients worldwide.

products.name: Customized Separate Accounts
products.description: Discretionary customized portfolios of private markets funds and direct investments tailored to client objectives; approximately $99 billion AUM as of March 31, 2025.

products.name: Specialized Funds
products.description: Commingled primary, secondary, and direct investment funds across private markets including evergreen offerings; approximately $40 billion AUM as of March 31, 2025.

products.name: Advisory Services
products.description: Non-discretionary investment advisory and reporting services for clients managing their own private markets portfolios, comprising approximately $819 billion AUA.
